reviews.review_title: Owned by a known child predator
reviews.review_description:
Owner of the game PacBot aka Billy Dennis Williams age 49 is a known child predator.

There is evidence of the owner luring minors into sharing explicit photos and sharing explicit content for in-game positions and items. The actual game itself is poorly developed and includes multiple potential threats including but not limited to "IP loggers", these are normally fine except for the fact that multiple non-professional ones have been found inside of the app. The owner has also had relationships with minors in the past, albeit online but still relationships.
